channel.title: Prompt to Profit Insights
channel.description: Latest posts from Prompt to Profit Insights.

item.title: No Passwords, No Emails, Just Building: The Frictionless Future of AI Education
item.description: Why removing email-password login friction gives schools better privacy, faster onboarding, and more cognitive space for real AI building outcomes.

item.title: Why 8-Year-Olds Are Building Better Websites Than Most Adults
item.description: How children are outperforming adults in AI-assisted web creation through natural prompting, fearless iteration, and outcome-first thinking.

item.title: The End of "Theory Only" Technology Classes
item.description: Why schools must move from memorizing computer concepts to practical AI-driven digital building, and what a modern curriculum should prioritize.

item.title: Future-Proofing Your Classrooms: How to Give Your School the Practical AI Advantage
item.description: A practical guide for school leaders on introducing AI education without technical friction, while preserving student privacy and building real-world skills.
